failure.symptom: nuxt-module-build prepare失败（Cannot find package nuxi），dev启动报Could not load @vite-pwa/nuxt
attempted: dev:prepare → nuxt-module-build build --stub → Cannot load module
npm install nuxi → dev:prepare → Invalid command
npm run dev → Could not load @vite-pwa/nuxt
failure.recommendation: 该nuxt模块需要特定构建流程，与Node v25不兼容
